raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/XXXX I spoke to XXXX to make legit changes to my internet service. 
XX/XX/XXXX I received a call on my VM box from XXXX about a 50 % savings. Phone Numer XXXX at XXXX. 
XX/XX/XXXX I called the number back to find out that XXXX was teaming up with XXXX for customers to save 50 % off their bill IF they pay one year ahead! At a discounted rate, using XXXX gift cards totaling {$540.00}! They instructed I get XXXX gift cards with {$270.00} EACH. 
XX/XX/XXXX I went to XXXX XXXX and purchased XXXX XXXX gift cards ( have receipt ) each for $ XXXX {$540.00}. 
XX/XX/XXXX I called back to provide ( so called XXXX ) the cards. 
XX/XX/XXXX I received a text ( # XXXX ) that there was a problem with my payment! THIS IS I sadly learned I was scammed and DID NOT provide the caller with more $ . I started researching, calling XXXX, FTC and my credit card company! 
XX/XX/XXXX Another text XXXX claiming a refund check will arrive once I provide more funds for this limited deal! 
XX/XX/XXXX I called XXXX security team and spoke to XXXX ( sounded like XXXX  ) and reported the scam! No HELP! I am at a loss as who is responsible to move forward at small claims court. It is still happening and recently on XX/XX/XXXX received another call!! 
On a forum for XXXX there is XXXX pages of others reporting and most are out alot more money than I was.... 

Filled a dispute with my XXXX  XXXX XXXX since and both have been rejected. I have spent my own money to submit the detailed packet of information by certified mail as well.
